recent_excerpts: CVE-2026-41940: Unauthenticated remote attackers can bypass authentication in cPanel & WHM and WP Squared. CVSS 9.8. Patch released April 28, 2026.
Rapid7 VP Christiaan Beek warns attackers are exploiting weak credentials and known flaws faster than defenders can patch — pace, not technique, is the 2026 differentiator.
Rapid7 argues most breaches result from visibility gaps in asset, identity, and attack path coverage rather than sophisticated exploits.
